member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for and that integrate with MonadicSharp patterns.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions.DeserializeBody``1(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage)
member.summary: Deserializes the message body from JSON into . Returns Result.Failure(Validation) if deserialization fails.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions.DeserializeAndValidate``1(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage,System.Func{``0,MonadicSharp.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Deserializes the message body and applies to the result. Combines deserialization and domain validation in one step.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions.CompleteOrDeadLetterAsync``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceiver,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes the message if is Success, otherwise dead-letters it with the error details.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions.CompleteOrDeadLetterAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceiver,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes the message if is Success, otherwise dead-letters it with the error details. Task overload — awaits the result before deciding.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusReceiverExtensions.ReceiveAndDeserializeAsync``1(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceiver,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives up to messages and deserializes each one into . Returns a list of (message, Result<T>) pairs — preserving the original message for complete/dead-letter decisions downstream.
Processes a batch of received messages through , then completes successes and dead-letters failures atomically. Returns the partition of (successes, failures) for observability.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusSenderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for that wrap send operations in for Railway-Oriented Programming.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusSenderExtensions.SendAsync``1(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusSender,``0,System.Action{Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Serializes to JSON and sends it as a Service Bus message. Returns Result.Failure on any send error.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusSenderExtensions.SendRawAsync(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusSender,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a pre-built . Returns Result.Failure on any send error. Use this overload when you have already constructed the message manually.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBusSenderExtensions.SendBatchAsync``1(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusSender,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Action{``0,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Serializes and sends a batch of messages. Collects per-message results — does not short-circuit on partial failures. Use results.Partition() to separate successes from failures.
